text.title: Role-Specialized Models Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every role-specialized-models spec MUST enforce.

rule.statement: Each role's model assignment MUST satisfy a documented competence floor (Bench score threshold).
rule.rationale: Sub-floor assignment introduces silent quality regressions.

rule.statement: Default model MUST NOT be the frontier model unless the role's competence floor demands it.
Every role MUST have a per-role eval set (>=50 prompts) with pass/fail metrics.
rule.rationale: Without per-role evals you can't safely downgrade.

rule.statement: Routing MUST be re-evaluated quarterly against new model releases.
rule.rationale: Model frontier shifts; static routing leaves savings on the table.

rule.statement: On error or low-confidence output, the spec MUST fall back to a stronger model.
